A quick walkthrough

A short tour of how WithMe works in everyday moments.

Grounded in evidence

Built on approaches that work

Every tip is grounded in Pivotal Response Treatment (PRT) and Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT) — two of the most evidence-based approaches available. Written in plain language. No jargon. No pressure. Just practical help for real moments.

PRT
Koegel & Koegel
ACT
Hayes
Get WithMe on your phone

Open it, then add it to your home screen

WithMe runs right in your phone's browser — no app store needed. Add it to your home screen and it opens full-screen with its own icon, just like a regular app.

Open WithMe →
Or scan to openPoint your phone's camera at the code.

On iPhone

  1. Open WithMe in Safari.
  2. Tap the Share button ↑ at the bottom.
  3. Tap Add to Home Screen, then Add.

Must be opened in Safari — not Chrome or an in-app browser.

On Android

  1. Open WithMe in Chrome.
  2. Tap the menu ⋮ in the top-right.
  3. Tap Add to Home screen, then Add.

Once added, just tap the WithMe icon any time.

About this app

Why we made WithMe

WithMe is a public service initiative by True Love for Special Need Families, created to empower parents and caregivers to use effective, interaction-based strategies during everyday moments — and to ease the stress that so often comes with them.

WithMe is an educational and supportive resource. It is meant to complement, not replace, the guidance of qualified professionals. For concerns specific to your child, please consult your child's care team or a qualified behavior analyst.

WithMe is in beta — tell us what you think

This is an early version, and your input shapes what comes next. If something doesn't work, feels confusing, or you'd love a new feature, we'd genuinely like to hear from you.

Share feedback →
